name: Belong Lending
description_short: Detroit-based mortgage broker offering home purchase loans, refinancing, and rate comparison tools with claimed 30-day funding timelines.
description_long:
Belong Lending is a mortgage broker operating out of Detroit that specializes in helping both first-time homebuyers and existing homeowners refinance their mortgages. The company positions itself as a rate-shopping alternative to traditional lenders, emphasizing competitive pricing and fast approval timelines. Their website prominently features tools for pre-approval letters, refinance calculators, and rate comparisons across different loan terms and products. The company claims to complete funding in 30 days or less through their streamlined online application process.

Belong Lending offers six primary service categories: home purchase loans for buyers, refinancing for rate reduction, rate comparison tools, expedited funding options, property evaluations, and cash-out refinance products. They market themselves as a broker that helps customers avoid accepting the first mortgage offer, instead encouraging rate shopping and comparison. The company maintains a team of mortgage advisors and loan officers who guide customers through the buying or refinancing process. All application and approval processes are conducted online according to their marketing materials.

The company differentiates itself primarily through speed claims (30-day funding), online-first application processes, and rate comparison positioning. Customer testimonials on their website highlight specific loan officers (Demetrius, Jalen, Antoinette) and praise their responsiveness, availability, and ability to close quickly. One testimonial specifically mentions closing on a home purchase in 30 days. The company emphasizes putting customers in control by enabling rate shopping rather than accepting initial offers.

Belong Lending operates as a mortgage broker rather than a direct lender, meaning they likely source loans from third-party lenders. The website contains no information about licensing, regulatory compliance, Better Business Bureau ratings, or specific loan programs offered (FHA, VA, conventional). Testimonials appear to be curated rather than third-party verified. No pricing information, APR ranges, credit score requirements, or loan limits are disclosed on the website. The claimed 30-day funding timeline is presented without context about standard industry timelines or conditions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Online-first application process eliminates in-person visits to branches
Free rate comparison tool allows shopping multiple mortgage terms before committing
Free pre-approval letter and refinance calculator tools with no stated application fees
Specific loan officer availability and responsiveness highlighted in customer testimonials
Claims 30-day or faster funding timelines for home purchases and refinances
Offers cash-out refinance options to access home equity
Property evaluation services included to help borrowers understand home value for loan terms
cons: No disclosed information about licensing, regulatory oversight, or complaint history
Website contains no APR ranges, rates, fees, credit requirements, or loan limits to set expectations
Testimonials appear curated on company website rather than from verified third-party platforms like Google or BBB
Operates as a broker rather than direct lender, so actual loan terms and approval depend on third-party lenders
No information about specific loan programs (FHA, VA, conventional), making it unclear what borrower types qualify
best_for: First-time homebuyers in Michigan seeking guidance through the purchase process and pre-approval
Existing homeowners looking to refinance mortgages at lower rates or access home equity
Mortgage shoppers who want to compare rates across multiple loan terms before committing
diagnosis: Belong Lending is best for Michigan homebuyers and refinancers who prefer online application processes and want to compare mortgage rates before committing. However, prospective borrowers should verify the company's licensing and complaint history independently, request specific APR ranges and fee schedules upfront, and confirm whether the 30-day funding claims apply to their specific situation, as no disclaimers or conditions are listed on the website.
services: Home purchase loan applications and approval
Mortgage rate comparison tools for shopping different terms
Free pre-approval letters for home purchase qualification
Refinance calculators to estimate monthly savings
Cash-out refinance products to access home equity
Online loan application and approval process
Mortgage advisor guidance through buying or refinancing
Fast funding options (claimed 30 days or less)
Loan officer assignment and customer support
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
